summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was inferred, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions were planned because this job disables instant close, merge, fix, and fix PR creation.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR for a live feature request, but it is not merge-ready because review changes and failing checks remain; closure/fix/merge are outside this job.
Useful focused bug-fix PR, but it has a dirty merge state and active re-review context; with merge/fix disabled, it should remain open.
Focused availability bug-fix PR that appears promising, but this inventory job cannot merge or fix and requires maintainer judgment for green focused bug fixes.
The PR should remain open, but unresolved bot findings and failed proof/checks block any close, fixed-by-candidate, or merge-style classification.
Maintainer-signaled draft migration/refactor PR with broad session-state surface; keep it open as related inventory, with no automated close/merge/fix path in this job.
